Table of Contents

RocketBlogAPITokens.cs Documentation

This document provides a reference for the Razor tokens available in RocketBlogAPITokens.cs. These tokens are specific to the RocketBlogAPI module and extend the RocketDirectoryAPI tokens.

Token: AssignDataModel

Assigns the data model for Razor templates by calling the base AssignDataModel from RocketDirectoryAPITokens. This makes all directory data objects available and sets up the model for blog-specific data.

Signature

public new string AssignDataModel(SimplisityRazor sModel)

Parameters

Name Type Description
sModel SimplisityRazor The main Razor model containing all data objects.

Returns

An empty string. This method is used for its side effects.

Example

@AssignDataModel(Model)
JSON ```json { "type": "token", "name": "AssignDataModel", "source_file": "DNNRocketModules/RocketBlogAPI/Render/RocketBlogTokens.cs", "description": "Assigns the data model for Razor templates by calling the base `AssignDataModel` from `RocketDirectoryAPITokens`. This makes all directory data objects available and sets up the model for blog-specific data.", "signature": "public new string AssignDataModel(SimplisityRazor sModel)", "parameters": [ { "name": "sModel", "type": "SimplisityRazor", "description": "The main Razor model containing all data objects." } ], "returns": "An empty string. This method is used for its side effects.", "example": "@AssignDataModel(Model)" } ```
